lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on either the interior or exterior. The car has been meticulously maintained and is in like-new condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear on the upholstery and carpet. All mechanical systems are currently operational.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The engine starts but has a persistent internal knock and significant oil leaks, while the transmission slips badly when shifting into third gear. The body shows visible rust on the rocker panels and the interior is heavily worn. This car requires extensive mechanical repairs and is best suited for a dedicated mechanic or as a parts donor.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive repairs to be roadworthy. The engine struggles to start and idles roughly, likely indicating a need for a major tune-up or significant internal work. Additionally, the transmission shifts harshly between gears, and the suspension feels quite loose. The exterior shows significant signs of age, including several rust spots on the wheel wells and heavily faded paint. Inside, the upholstery is worn with visible tears and some staining. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited for a buyer looking for a project or for use as a parts vehicle.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic and well-maintained vehicle! It's in great condition overall, showing that it’s been treated with real care over the years. You’ll find the performance is smooth and dependable, and while there are a few light cosmetic signs of previous adventures, it still looks sharp and feels solid. This is a reliable, high-quality choice for anyone looking for a car that’s ready for its next chapter!

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive engineering, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This vehicle exhibits flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity, representing a rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning enthusiast. Every surface and component reflects a rigorous commitment to preservation, ensuring an unparalleled driving experience and long-term value for its next proprietor.

Hey there! You have to see this beauty to believe it! It’s honestly in such incredible shape, you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve absolutely pampered this car—it’s been garage-kept, spotlessly cleaned, and looks totally flawless inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh feel to it. I'm so excited for the next owner to get behind the wheel because it’s truly a gem. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This collector-grade 2002 BMW M3 (E46) represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. Power is derived from the S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring six individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, delivering a seamless 333 hp to the rear wheels. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec M Variable Differential Lock, the drivetrain remains tight and responsive. Mechanical integrity is paramount; the subframe has been professionally reinforced, and both rod bearing and VANOS services are fully documented. The chassis retains its factory-correct MacPherson strut and multi-link geometry, providing the precise
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Inspections welcome.

Step into a vehicle that defies its age, presented in absolute showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in a flawless exterior with a mirror-like finish and zero stone chips or blemishes. The cabin is a sanctuary of luxury, featuring supple, unmarked leather seats, pristine carpets, and every electronic component functioning exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, backed by a comprehensive, top-tier maintenance record that ensures a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new model. With incredibly low mileage and a history of adult ownership, this is the finest example available on the market today for the discerning buyer who demands perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled refinement. This vehicle has been curated to maintain its original showroom integrity, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic and mechanical precision that satisfies the most exacting standards. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it represents the pinnacle of its class, offering a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand uncompromising excellence.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and impeccable mechanical integrity, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Every detail has been meticulously preserved to ensure a driving experience that rivals a new acquisition. We invite discerning buyers to appreciate this rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of such distinguished caliber and flawless provenance.

Hey there! Honestly, I’m a little sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it still feels like it just rolled off the lot! It’s been pampered since day one, kept in the garage, and looks stunning inside and out. You won’t find a cleaner one out there. Come take it for a spin!
Presenting an investment-grade E92 M3 in concours-level condition. This specimen features the high-revving S65 4
Mint condition. Flawless exterior and interior. Mechanically perfect. Garage kept.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality masterpiece that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero paint imperfections. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple, unscented leather, untouched carpeting, and every electronic component functioning in perfect synchronicity. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; it comes with a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized specialists, ensuring it drives with the same precision and responsiveness as the day it was manufactured. Never driven in rain or snow, this car represents a rare opportunity to own a piece of automotive history in its purest form. Includes all original manuals, two master keys, and a custom-fitted car cover.

We are proud to present an exceptional example of automotive excellence, preserved in impeccable, showroom condition. This vehicle reflects a standard of care that satisfies even the most discerning collector, with every surface—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments—remaining in an as-new state. Mechanically superlative and aesthetically perfect, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly distinguished motorcar.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original factory state. This motorcar exhibits a level of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its pristine showroom character. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of automotive excellence. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our exacting benchmarks for performance and reliability.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s in absolute showroom condition—I’ve babied this car since day one and it still looks and smells brand new! Not a single scratch or ding to be found. It drives like an absolute dream and I’m only letting it go because I need something a bit bigger for the family. You’re going to love it!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3, meticulously maintained to preserve its mechanical purity and high-revving character. This example features the S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies, benefiting from a comprehensive VANOS bulletproofing and documented rod bearing replacement. The chassis is structurally optimized with rear subframe reinforcement plates and upgraded Bilstein dampening to maintain precise turn-in geometry. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal power delivery. The exterior retains its factory luster with ceramic protection,
Mint condition. Low mileage. Original paint. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Interior flawless.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin remains immaculate; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear or creasing, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car scent. Mechanically, it is flawless, having been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy. Every button, switch, and electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it was delivered. Complete with a meticulous service history, original window sticker, and both sets of keys, this car offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This example remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing the pinnacle of its class. Every surface reflects meticulous care, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection. This is a definitive acquisition for those seeking an unblemished driving experience.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserving its showroom-fresh aesthetic and mechanical integrity. It represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle in pristine, uncompromising condition. Every detail reflects a legacy of meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to show you this total beauty. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It has been pampered and loved, so it's completely spotless inside and out. If you've been searching for a ride that’s practically perfect, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look—you're going to love it!
This 2008 Porsche 911 Carrera S is a definitive example of naturally aspirated precision. The 3.8L flat-six powerplant features
Mint condition. Clean title. Low mileage. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Interior like new.

Experience automotive perfection with this absolute gem. This vehicle is in pristine, showroom-quality condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, protected by a recent ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any bolster wear, while the original factory scent still lingers. Every electronic component, from the premium sound system to the advanced navigation, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized dealers confirming its pampered life. It drives as smoothly and powerfully as it did the moment it rolled off the assembly line, with no leaks, rattles, or hesitations. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly flawless example that looks, feels, and smells brand new.

We are pleased to present this superlative example, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and aesthetic perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the absolute best.
